titles: "안전한 채권이라며…" 채권 ETF 이름만 보고 사면 당하는 5가지 함정
금리 인하 전에 TLT 몰빵하면 큰일나는 이유 — SHY·IEF·TLT 듀레이션 5분 정리
TLT -31% 맞은 박대리, 2026년엔 뭘 사야 했나 | 채권 ETF 완전 해부
thumbnail_texts: 금리 인하 D-6개월 / 채권 판이 바뀐다

character_poses.1: REACT-02 걱정/경고 — '안전자산'이라던 TLT가 -31% 박살난 충격, 식은땀
character_poses.2: INTRO-01 노트필기 — 분석가 똑똑이가 SHY·IEF·TLT 3형제 듀레이션 메모
character_poses.3: REACT-01 생각 중 — 금리 인하 D-6개월, 채권 판 어떻게 짜야 하나

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 걱정/경고(REACT-02). 좌측 똑똑이가 이마에 땀방울, 양손 깍지 끼고 불안한 표정. 우측에 'SAFE' 라벨이 붙은 깨진 황금 방패, 그 뒤로 빨간 급락 곡선이 가파르게 내려꽂힘. 방패 주변에 빨간 균열 라인. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with worried expression, small pink nose, slight frown, a single sweat drop on forehead, both paws clasped together nervously in front of chest. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large cracked golden shield with a small embossed 'SAFE' badge, fractured down the middle with visible red crack lines spreading across its surface. Behind the shield, a steeply downward-plunging red line chart drops sharply through the frame. Floating crimson warning particles and small ember sparks surround the broken shield. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle red warning glow and faint financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red warning atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 노트필기(INTRO-01). 좌측 정장+안경 똑똑이가 책상에서 노트에 메모하며 진지한 표정. 우측에 거대한 시소(저울) — 한쪽 끝(짧은 팔)에 작은 'SHY' 카드, 중앙 'IEF' 카드, 다른 쪽 끝(긴 팔)에 큰 'TLT' 카드가 매달려 듀레이션 차이를 시각화. 시소 위에 작은 화살표(↑금리). 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes behind small round glasses, small pink nose, focused serious analyst expression, wearing a tiny dark navy business suit with red tie, sitting at a small desk holding a notebook with one paw, the other paw writing with a pencil, brow slightly furrowed in concentration. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large industrial seesaw structure with three bond ETF cards hanging at progressively longer lever arms — small 'SHY' card closest to the fulcrum, medium 'IEF' card at middle distance, large 'TLT' card hanging at the farthest end. A small upward arrow icon hovers above the seesaw indicating rising interest rates, with the long-arm side tilting downward. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern and soft golden accent particles. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 생각 중(REACT-01). 좌측 똑똑이가 한 손 턱에 대고 위쪽 응시, 머리 위 작은 생각 말풍선에 전구. 우측에 큰 황금 시계 — 시침이 'D-6'을 가리킴, 시계 옆에 빛나는 화살표가 위에서 아래로(금리↓), 그 아래 황금 채권 ETF 카드 한 장이 우상향 가도록 빛남. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking upward, small pink nose, thoughtful pondering expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot, one paw resting on chin in thinking pose, a small thought bubble above the head containing a glowing light bulb icon. On the RIGHT side: a large ornate golden clock face with its hour hand pointing distinctly to a 'D-6' marker position, surrounded by a soft warm halo. Beside the clock, a luminous downward arrow trail descends suggesting falling interest rates, and below it a single golden bond ETF card glows brightly with a small upward growth arrow above it. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.
